verify.title: Unlock payments
verify.description: Bank deposits, QR codes, and local payment methods

deposit.title: Deposit
deposit.description: Add money to make your first payment

card.title: Spend anywhere Visa is accepted
card.description: Use your balance at 150M+ merchants. Online, contactless.

outbound.title: Make your first payment
outbound.description: Start paying to Pix and MercadoPago QR codes

addEmail.title: Add your email
addEmail.description: We need an email address to finish setting up your account.

completeSetup.title: Complete your setup
completeSetup.description: We need an updated document before you can add money.

verificationIssue.title: Verification issue
verificationIssue.description: Contact support for help with your verification.

autoBalance.title: Finish setting up your card
autoBalance.description: One passkey tap to start using your card.
autoBalance.descriptionError: We couldn't finish setting up your card. Please try again, or skip for now — we'll prompt you again on your first card payment.

cardLaunch.title: shhhh
cardLaunch.subtitle: Tap to find out if you're in

history.networkErrorDescription: Check your connection and try again.
history.emptyDescription: Start by sending or requesting money

items.ownCountryTransfers: Bank transfers to your own accounts in {country}
items.qrBrAr: QR Payments in Brazil and Argentina

perk.surpriseDescriptionFirst: Check out your rewards now and earn more.
perk.surpriseDescriptionNext: Check out your rewards and how to earn more.

card.title: Get your Peanut Card
card.description: Closed beta. Badges skip the line. $10 unlocks on your first $100 spend.

invite.title: Invite friends. Earn rewards
invite.description: Earn rewards every time your friends use Peanut.

notifications.title: Stay in the loop!
notifications.description: Turn on notifications and get alerts for all your wallet activity.
notifications.blockedToast: Notifications blocked by your browser. Enable them in site settings and reload.

iosPwa.title: Add Peanut to your home screen
iosPwa.description: Follow a quick guide to add the app to your home screen, no download needed.

qrPay.title: Pay with QR code payments
qrPay.description: Get the best exchange rate, pay like a local and earn rewards.

latamInvite.title: Earn rewards on QR payments
latamInvite.description: Invite friends to earn more rewards. The more they use, the more you earn!

bugBounty.title: Help us improve and get $5!
bugBounty.description: Report a bug. Get rewarded! No questions asked.

kyc.title: Unlock QR code payments
kyc.description: Confirm your ID to pay with Mercado Pago and PIX QR codes

unsupported-browser.title: Browser Not Supported
unsupported-browser.description: Please open Peanut in your device's main browser (Safari, Chrome, Firefox) to continue setup. If you are already in your main browser your device may not support Peanut.

android-initial-pwa-install.title: Get the full experience
android-initial-pwa-install.description: Keep your wallet one tap away. Safe, fast, and on your home screen.

pwa-install.title: Install Peanut on your phone
pwa-install.description: Please install Peanut on your phone for the best experience!

landing.title: Peanut makes dollars easy.
landing.description: Create your wallet in seconds to save, send, or cash out dollars fast.

welcome.title: Peanut is invite-only
welcome.description: Who invited you? Enter their username to continue, or join the waitlist and we'll reach out when you're eligible.

signup.title: How should we call you?
signup.description: Choose your username. It'll be your ID to send and receive money.

passkey-permission.title: Let's set up your passkey
passkey-permission.description: Use your face or fingerprint to log in. No passwords, no hassle. Just you.

sign-test-transaction.title: Your account is ready
sign-test-transaction.description: Just confirm it's you — one tap and you're in.

existingSession.title: You're already signed in
existingSession.description: This device is signed in as {username}. Continue with that account, or log out to create a new one.

braveInstall.title: Success!
braveInstall.description: Please open the Peanut app from your home screen to continue setup.

installPwa.installCancelled: Installation cancelled. You can try adding to Home Screen again.
installPwa.manualInstallHint: To install the app, please add it to your Home Screen from your browser menu.
installPwa.mobileFirstDescription: For a better experience, use Peanut on your phone.

setup.loginFailed: We couldn’t log you in. Please try again.

landing.recoverWallet: Need to recover your Peanut wallet?

waitlist.inviterNotFound: No Peanut member with that username. Double-check your inviter's exact handle.
waitlist.loginCanceled: Login was canceled. Please try again.
waitlist.noPasskey: No passkey found. Please create a wallet first.
waitlist.loginUnexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred during login.

errors.tooShort: Username must be at least 4 characters long
errors.tooLong: Username must be at most 12 characters long
errors.invalidFormat: Username must contain only lowercase letters and numbers and start with a letter
errors.invalid: Username is invalid, please use a different one
errors.checkFailed: Failed to check handle availability. Please try again.
errors.checkFailedSupport: Failed to check handle availability. Please try again or contact support.

signupStep.termsAgreement: By creating account you agree with <terms>T&C</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>

passkey.notAvailable: Passkeys aren’t available on this device yet. Please try again.
passkey.cancelled: Passkey setup was cancelled. Please try again when ready.
passkey.usernameTaken: This username is already registered — possibly from an earlier attempt on this device. If that was you, your passkey is ready: just log in.
passkey.learnMore: Learn more about what Passkeys are

descriptions.notReadable: There's an issue with your device's passkey settings. Please try again.
descriptions.notAllowedAndroid: We couldn’t create a passkey. This usually means you’re not signed in to a Google account, Google Play Services is out of date, or screen lock isn’t set up. Fix one of these and retry — or it may have been cancelled.
descriptions.notAllowed: Passkeys are not enabled on your device. Check your device settings to enable them
descriptions.invalidState: A passkey already exists for this account on your device.
descriptions.default: Something went wrong during passkey setup. This is likely a device issue.

errors.loadUserFailed: Failed to load user data. Please refresh the page.
errors.noWalletAddress: No wallet address found. Please try refreshing the page.
errors.userNotLoaded: User data not loaded. Please refresh the page.
errors.setupFailed: Failed to complete account setup. Please try again by clicking the button below.
errors.supportNeeded: We're having trouble setting up your account. Our team has been notified. Please contact support for help.

finish.title: Sign a test transaction
finish.description: Let's make sure your passkey is working and you have everything set up correctly.
